title: Old Sensei is long dead
wikitext:
[]: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Dec 07, 2020 1:34 am When I went to check on the wiki, I looked up Eiji Maruyama because I realize we don't have an article on him, despite his character Nebukawa no Sensei, aka Old Sensei, being this site's very icon. And it turns out he's been dead since 2015 and none of us realized it. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encycl ... hp?id=1136 A very belated R.I.P. to Eiji Maruyama, and R.I.P. to Old Sensei, I guess.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by Berserker » Mon Dec 07, 2020 4:10 am Oh, that's actually sad. Rest in peace, sensei.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Mon Dec 07, 2020 4:42 am Well... a moment of reverie. ['] Rest in peace, Mr. Maruyama; you did a great job and you did it well.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Dec 07, 2020 6:22 am Damn, how did we completely miss that? R.I.P. Old Sensei.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Dec 07, 2020 6:27 am Rest in peace, sensei. He passed away in 2015, and no one heard. It's sad.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Dec 07, 2020 6:37 am Rest in peace, Old Sensei.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Mon Dec 07, 2020 8:43 am Rest in peace, Eiji Maruyama and you too, Old Sensei. Your days of lectures are now over...

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Dec 07, 2020 11:50 am Oh. I guess no one lives forever. Rip.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by orcot » Mon Dec 07, 2020 2:50 pm Rest in peace (doesn't NGE ends at the start of 2015? His character would have died in 2015)

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Dec 07, 2020 3:44 pm :( RIP He'll forever be part of this amazing work.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Dec 07, 2020 4:02 pm RIP, may your lectures reach the hearts of unsuspecting Children.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by IgRAzm » Mon Dec 07, 2020 4:21 pm One of the most innocent and decent men, in the middle of all the apocalyptic intrigues of NERV he was just trying to prepare the young generation for the complicated world they were living in. No one ever can replace you, the Old Man from Nebukawa-san. RIP. Eiji Maruyama was the perfect voice choice, someone should totally make an ASMR out of it, I'm saying without a hint of irony.

[]: Re: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Dec 08, 2020 11:59 am Oh shit, that's a curveball I did not see coming. Rest in peace, you icon of knowledge!
summary: []: Old Sensei is long dead             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Dec 07, 2020 1:34 am When I went to check on the wiki, I looked up Eiji Maruyama because I realize we don't have an article on him, despite his character Nebukawa no Sensei, aka Old Sensei, being this site's very icon. And it turns out he's been dead since 2015 and none of us realized it. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encycl ... hp?id=1136 A very belated R.I.P. to Ei
